title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 17 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 17 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/12/2024
Today, DCE iron ore futures rose initially but then fell, with the most-traded I2505 contract closing at 796.5 yuan/mt, up0.06% for the day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills purchased as needed. In Shandong, the mainstream transaction prices of PB fines were around 790 yuan/mt, stable compared to yesterday.
